## Step 0: Load Repo Context

Before proceeding, read the following required context files. If any required file is missing, **STOP** and report the error — do not proceed with reduced context.

**Required**:
- `specs/README.md` — project layout and conventions
- `specs/intent/vision.md` — product vision and goals
- `specs/intent/roadmap.md` — feature roadmap and priorities
- `.specify/templates/spec-template.md` — spec structure and required sections

<!-- REPO CONTEXT START -->

<!-- REPO CONTEXT END -->

If `.specify/version` exists, read it and warn if the file is missing or the version appears stale.
